description: Composition Teal round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, ribbed collar and bold graphic print on chest Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash with warm water of 40 degrees Wash inside out with like colours Do not bleach Dry in shade Do not iron on print This funky T-shirt from mr. men is a pefect choice for the young at heart. Pair this with form fitting denims and bright sneakers. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
